title: The Enchanted Ground
subtitle: The danger that feels like relief
intro: The air grows warm and kind after so much fear, and your eyelids call it mercy.
Nothing here snarls, accuses, or sells itself loudly. It only asks you to stop caring for a little while.
Keep walking, and keep Hopeful speaking. A sleeping pilgrim does not renounce the City; he simply forgets to desire it.
core_mechanic: A heavy drowse drains watchfulness; keep moving, resist soft couches, and let Hopeful's testimony keep desire for the City awake.
